Ethical Delights®
Homestyle Quality. Commercial Scale.
Satvik · Preservative-Free · Blast Frozen · Ready to Cook
Every flatbread is crafted from 100% whole wheat, kneaded fresh every batch with cold-pressed sunflower oil and Himalayan pink salt. Half-baked and blast frozen at –18°C to lock in homestyle freshness. From freezer to table in under 60 seconds — no kneading, no rolling, no prep stress.
🫓 Satvik Chapati 🫔 Satvik Puri 🍽 Whole Wheat Bhatura 🌯 Satvik Wraps
100% Satvik
No Maida
No Palm Oil
No Preservatives
–18°C Flash Frozen

Whole Wheat Bhatura — Oval · No Maida · Par-Fried · Perfect Puff  🚀 Coming Soon
Whole Wheat Bhatura
Whole Wheat Flour, Curd (Dahi), Cold Pressed Sunflower Oil, Baking Powder, Pink Salt
Medium-sized oval bhaturas from 100% whole wheat — golden brown, perfectly puffed and shiny. No maida, no shortcuts. Drop straight from freezer into hot oil (~180°C); puffed and ready in seconds. Ideal for chole bhatura at scale without compromising authenticity.
100% Whole Wheat Oval Shape Par-Fried Serve with Chole Coming Soon
